name: Pasta with Shell Beans & Greens
recipeIngredient: 2 lbs Greens (such as kale or a mixture of greens)
12 oz Penne, ziti or shell pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell the beans and place them in a pan with enough water to cover; add the bay leaf, half the sage, and 1 tablespoon of olive oil. Slice one garlic clove and add it along with the carrot. Season lightly with salt and simmer until the beans are tender, about 30 minutes. Add more water if needed.
2. Remove tough stems from the greens and roughly chop the leaves. Heat 2 tablespoons of olive oil in a skillet and gently wilt the onion. Chop the remaining garlic and sage leaves and add them to the onion along with red pepper flakes. Cook for a few minutes, then add the greens. Add about half a cup of cooking water from the beans and salt to taste; cook until the greens are tender, about 15 minutes.
3. When the greens are done, add the beans and enough liquid to create a light sauce. Cook the pasta in a large pot of boiling, salted water. When it is cooked, drain and add it directly to the greens and beans. Toss together, then transfer to a heated serving dish. Drizzle with remaining olive oil, season generously with pepper and freshly grated cheese.
